description: Lock Mass Media to predecessor media channels rather than sociology as a field of study.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to the existing radio/print-based modern mass-audience communication scope.
Radio broadcasting remains a direct broadcast mass-media channel.
Television remains a direct broadcast mass-media channel.
Newspapers remain the earlier print mass-audience channel in the mass-media lineage.
The newspaper relationship is a predecessor-media lineage, not an analytic social-science field.
Sociology should not be restored unless the node is rescoped to academic media studies.
